Module chariot
Package chariot.api

Interface ChallengesAuthCommon

All Known Subinterfaces:
BoardAuth, BotAuth, ChallengesAuth

    The challenge expires after 20s if not accepted.

    challengeAI(Consumer<ChallengesAuthCommon.ChallengeAIBuilder> params)

    challengeKeepAlive(String userId, Consumer<ChallengesAuthCommon.ChallengeBuilder> params)
    The challenge is kept alive until the stream is closed.
    Many<Event>
    connect()
    Stream the events reaching the Lichess user in real time.
    When the stream opens, all current challenges and games are sent.
    One<Void>
    declineChallenge(String challengeId)
     
    One<Void>
    declineChallenge(String challengeId, Enums.DeclineReason reason)

    declineChallenge(String challengeId, Function<Enums.DeclineReason.Provider,Enums.DeclineReason> reason)
     
    One<ChallengeInfo>
    show(String challengeId)
    Show one challenge.
    Get details about a challenge, even if it has been recently accepted, canceled or declined.

  • Method Details

    • connect

      Many<Event> connect()
      Stream the events reaching the Lichess user in real time.
      When the stream opens, all current challenges and games are sent.

    • challenge

      One<Challenge> challenge(String userId, Consumer<ChallengesAuthCommon.ChallengeBuilder> params)
      The challenge expires after 20s if not accepted.

    • challengeKeepAlive

      Many<Challenge> challengeKeepAlive(String userId, Consumer<ChallengesAuthCommon.ChallengeBuilder> params)
      The challenge is kept alive until the stream is closed.

    • show

      One<ChallengeInfo> show(String challengeId)
      Show one challenge.
      Get details about a challenge, even if it has been recently accepted, canceled or declined.
      Parameters:
      challengeId - the id of the challenge to show

    • challengeAI

      One<ChallengeAI> challengeAI(Consumer<ChallengesAuthCommon.ChallengeAIBuilder> params)

    • cancelChallenge

      One<Void> cancelChallenge(String challengeId)

    • cancelChallenge

      One<Void> cancelChallenge(String challengeId, Supplier<char[]> opponentToken)

    • acceptChallenge

      One<Void> acceptChallenge(String challengeId)

    • declineChallenge

      One<Void> declineChallenge(String challengeId)

    • declineChallenge

      One<Void> declineChallenge(String challengeId, Enums.DeclineReason reason)

    • declineChallenge

      default One<Void> declineChallenge(String challengeId, Function<Enums.DeclineReason.Provider,Enums.DeclineReason> reason)
